title: A New Kid in Town
story: Tsubasa and his mother arrive in a new city. They move to a small house on a quiet street. Tsubasa carries his ball everywhere, like a friend. Every day he kicks the ball against the wall of the garden. That is his practice. One day the ball flies onto the road. A big truck hits it — but Tsubasa is lucky. The ball saves his life! He stands up, alone on the street, and shouts to the sky: "I decide today! I will become a famous player. I promise!"

words.def: to get to a place at the end of a trip.
words.ex: Tsubasa arrives in the new city with his mother.
words.mn: 词源:a+rive,rive=river(河)。古时坐船,船靠河岸=到达。

words.def: to go to live in a new place; to change place.
words.ex: They move to a small house near the school.
words.mn: 联想:move 的 m 像两个箱子搬来搬去→搬家、移动。

words.def: a road in a town, with houses on the sides.
words.ex: The kids play football on the street.
words.mn: 对比记:street 比 road 多了房子。str- 开头常和'直'有关(straight 直的)→笔直的街。

words.def: to hit something with your foot.
words.ex: He kicks the ball against the wall a hundred times.
words.mn: 拟声:kick 读起来又短又快,就像踢球'嗑'的一声。

words.def: the hard side of a room, a house, or a garden; it stands up high.
words.ex: The ball hits the wall and comes back.
words.mn: 联想:W 像墙上的锯齿,all 全部→把全部挡住的东西=墙。

words.def: having good things happen to you by chance.
words.ex: Tsubasa is lucky: the ball stops the truck.
words.mn: luck(运气)+y(形容词尾巴,'…的')→有运气的。名词 luck,好运=good luck。

words.def: to stop someone from danger; to keep money to use later.
words.mn: 一词两用:救命是 save,存钱也是 save——都是'留住'。守门员扑救也叫 save!

words.def: doing something many times, so you get better at it.
words.ex: Kicking the wall is his practice every day.
words.mn: pract=做(practical 实际的)→反复做=练习。一万小时定律的那个词。

words.def: to say you will really do something, and mean it.
words.ex: "I promise, Mom. I will be careful."
words.mn: 词根:pro(向前)+mise(送出)→把话送出去收不回=承诺。

words.ex: He wants to become the best player in the world.
words.mn: be(是)+come(来)→'来到是'的状态=变成。过去式 became。

words.ex: Pelé is a famous player from Brazil.
words.mn: fame(名声)+ous(多…的)→名声很多=有名。

words.def: to hold something and take it with you.
words.ex: Tsubasa carries his ball everywhere, even to bed.
words.mn: car(车)+ry→像小车一样载着东西走=携带。

words.def: to choose after thinking about it.
words.ex: He decides to join the school team.
words.mn: 词根:de(下)+cide(切,scissors 剪刀的 cis)→一刀切下去,不再犹豫=决定。

words.ex: He is alone on the street, but not afraid.
words.mn: 真词源:all+one→全部就一个人=独自。

words.ex: He shouts: "I will be the best!"
words.mn: 联想:嘴张大发 /aʊ/ 的音本身就像在喊。out 在里面→喊'出'来。
